articles.author: Natalie Allison
articles.title: Amid war, Trump says he doesn’t ‘think about Americans’ financial situation’ - The Washington Post
articles.description: Trump said he is only concerned about Iran not having a nuclear weapon. “I don’t think about anybody,” he added.
articles.content: President Donald Trump on Tuesday said he does not consider the economic impacts the war in Iran is having on Americans, remarks that quickly drew criticism from Democrats and appeared to undermine h… [+63 chars]
